2236610.name: Glass Heart Demo
2236610.description:
To give you a glimpse into Glass Heart's world, we have created this side story!

Play as, Lacy, a recent graduate who has returned to her hometown. Meet and interact with each of the six love interests! Make fun decisions and get a feel for the game's dynamics and design.

Please note that this side story is NOT from Meira's (Glass Heart's Main Character) point of view.

The demo does not contain voiced lines; however Glass Heart will be fully voiced.
The Memory and Extra Tabs are not available in the demo.
There are no affection meters/good or bad endings.

The purpose of this demo is an interactive introduction of the main cast.

That being said, we hope that you enjoy this short side story!
